news.title: OKX and HashKey invest in new Vietnam exchange ahead of crypto licensing push
news.summary: The partnership will help the exchange meet Vietnam's $380 million capital requirement to enter a government pilot program aimed at licensing local platforms and curbing offshore trading.

news.title: Mythos AI threat prompts Bessent, Powell to convene bank CEOs for urgent talks
news.summary: Mythos can rapidly spot software flaws and craft sophisticated exploits, raising fears of systemic risks in the banking system.

news.title: Bitcoin tops $72,000, but Circle and Bullish drop sharply after downgrades
news.summary: Eased Middle East tensions pushed crypto prices and U.S. stocks sizable hjigher.
